details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level reports/audit/ (present) and reports/board/ (missing).
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing — governance contract requires both reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to exist.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with active Python code (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot package. These are code files, not audit/docs documenting removal.
